channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Structural Challenges Undermine Malawi’s Media and Press Freedom
item.description: A recent High Court judgment by Judge Kenyatta Nyirenda has ignited national debate in Malawi over the quality of local journalism, exposing deep structural weaknesses beyond mere newsroom incompetenc...

item.title: PNP investigates viral social media post claiming nationwide class and work suspensions due to alleged security threat
item.description: Iniimbestigahan ng Philippine National Police (PNP) ang kumalat na post sa social media na nagsasabing magkakaroon umano ng nationwide suspension ng klase at trabaho mula Marso 4 hanggang 6 dahil sa i...

item.title: Immanuel Ndungu Jokes with Jeff Koinange Over Netizens' DNA Question
item.description: Citizen TV news anchor Immanuel Ndungu recently had a funny moment with veteran journalist Jeff Koinange on JKLive. Ndungu shared with Jeff that social media users have been asking if he is Jeff's son...

item.title: Senior Executive Offers Insights and Guidance for Women Navigating the Business World
item.description: In a candid discussion, a senior executive shared her experiences and advice for women pursuing careers in business. Highlighting both successes and challenges, she acknowledged that career growth is ...

item.title: Rajya Sabha Elections 2026: Nitish Kumar Files Nomination; Congress and MVA Announce Candidates
item.description: On 5th March 2026, the political atmosphere across India witnessed significant developments ahead of the Rajya Sabha biennial elections. Bihar Chief Minister Nitish Kumar officially announced that he ...

item.title: Commonwealth Bank says AI-driven productivity gains could lift Australia’s growth without increasing inflation
item.description: The Commonwealth Bank of Australia (CBA) believes that wider adoption of artificial intelligence across businesses and government agencies could significantly improve Australia’s economic performance ...

item.title: British nationals face delays and chaos in evacuation from Middle East amid ongoing US-Israel-Iran conflict
item.description: British nationals in the Middle East, particularly in Oman and Dubai, are experiencing significant difficulties evacuating due to the escalating conflict between the US, Israel, and Iran, now in its s...

item.title: Trillanes files perjury and cyberlibel complaints against 18 ex-Marines and others over false $2M ICC bribe claims
item.description: Former Senator Antonio Trillanes IV filed multiple criminal complaints at the Department of Justice on March 5, 2026, in response to serious allegations made against him. A group of 18 individuals, re...

item.title: Angélique Kidjo Announces Star-Studded Album 'Hope' Featuring Davido, Ayra Starr, and Pharrell Williams
item.description: Legendary Beninese singer Angélique Kidjo don land ground with her new album wey dem don title 'Hope'. Kidjo announce say the album go drop on April 24, 2026, and e involve plenty big names from aroun...

item.title: Devils edge Maple Leafs 4-3 in shootout after late comeback
item.description: In a tightly contested game on Wednesday night in Newark, N.J., the New Jersey Devils defeated the Toronto Maple Leafs 4-3 in a shootout. Paul Cotter scored the decisive shootout goal, while Connor Br...

item.title: Minister Highlights Importance of Electricity for Women's Education and Economic Participation
item.description: In Dar es Salaam, Minister for Community Development, Gender, Women and Special Groups, Dorothy Gwajima, emphasised that access to reliable electricity is very key for empowering women and achieving g...

item.title: Proteas captain Markram reflects on T20 World Cup semifinal defeat to New Zealand
item.description: South Africa’s T20 World Cup campaign came to a crushing halt as they suffered a nine-wicket defeat to New Zealand in the semifinal in Kolkata. Proteas captain Aiden Markram described the loss as feel...

item.title: Modern kitchen design shifts from triangles to task-based zones
item.description: Traditionally, kitchen design has relied on the 'kitchen triangle' — a layout that positions the oven, sink, and refrigerator to form a triangle, optimising movement and efficiency. Designers like Reb...

item.title: TTAP Holds Protest Rally Over 27th Constitutional Amendment, Announces Nationwide Black Day
item.description: ISLAMABAD: The Tehreek Tahaffuz-e-Ayeen-Pakistan (TTAP) organised a significant protest rally on Tuesday against the 27th Constitutional Amendment, marching from Parliament House to the Supreme Court....

item.title: Uttar Pradesh Seer Arrested Over Alleged Illegal Religious Conversion Network
item.description: In Balrampur district's Rehra Maafi village near Utraula town, residents still recall Jamaluddin, now widely known as Chhangur Baba. Once a modest trader cycling between villages and selling trinkets,...

item.title: How AI, Robotics, and Wearables Are Shaping Workplace Safety in Canada
item.description: Around 60 per cent of Canadian employees are expected to see their jobs transformed by artificial intelligence (AI), mostly as a complement rather than a replacement. AI technologies—including wearabl...

item.title: Canada Launches Carbon Removal Coalition to Secure $100 Million in Investments by 2030
item.description: Canada’s emerging carbon removal sector is uniting under a new initiative, the Advance Carbon Removal Coalition, aiming to attract $100 million in project investments by 2030. The coalition brings tog...

item.title: Analysing the Green Party's national polling surge after their Gorton and Denton byelection victory
item.description: A recent YouGov poll conducted after the Green Party's historic byelection win in Gorton and Denton shows the party reaching 21% national support, overtaking Labour (which has fallen behind) and closi...

item.title: Ofwat fines South East Water £22m for repeated service failures affecting customers in Kent and Sussex
item.description: Ofwat has announced that South East Water will face a £22 million fine due to repeated failures in water supply across Kent and Sussex between 2020 and 2023, which disrupted service for over 286,000 p...

item.title: How Elephant Migration Guides Human-Wildlife Coexistence in Northern Kenya
item.description: In Northern Kenya, the movement of elephants like the 24-year-old matriarch Liana highlights how humans and wildlife share landscapes under climate stress. In January 2026, GPS collars tracked Liana a...
